dkrs.decision_target: Determine the smallest correction for resolution-order-independent explicit boundaries and context-free lifecycle callbacks.
dkrs.stop_rule: Stop when focused replay, exact-head CI, and independent review agree, or return a blocking checkpoint.

orchestrator.terminal_condition: Continue until required_pr_check_success_count equals 6 with every active anti-goal held, or stop on human direction or a blocking flag.
